mission.title: crossplane: Ability to patch into the key of an object value
mission.description: Ability to patch into the key of an object value. Requested by 26+ users.

steps.title: Check current crossplane deployment
steps.description:
Verify your crossplane version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane
helm list -n crossplane 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working crossplane installation.

steps.title: Review crossplane configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant crossplane configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane
kubectl get configmap -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=crossplane
```
### What problem are you facing?

Presently there is no way to patch the key name of an object value. Which makes any keys that are dynamic impossible to work with.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Ability to patch into the key of an object value
steps.description:
### Description of your changes

This PR adds support for convert transforms from JSON to object/array. This enables patching complex types (as proposed by  [here](https://github.com/crossplane/crossplane/pull/3458#issuecomment-1383183093)) other than just simple ones and could be used [to patch
```yaml
apiVersion: account.cloudflare.upbound.io/v1alpha1
kind: APIToken
metadata:
  namespace: default
  name: cf-test-apitoken
spec:
  forProvider:
    name: "cf-test-apitoken"
    policy:
      - effect: allow
        permissionGroups:
          - "dafdsagrt42409uhfhjtnl44957"
        resources:
          "com.cloudflare.api.account.zone.${UUID IN HERE}": "*"
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane
kubectl get events -n crossplane --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Ability to patch into the key of an object value" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
### Description of your changes

This PR adds support for convert transforms from JSON to object/array.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: account.cloudflare.upbound.io/v1alpha1
kind: APIToken
metadata:
  namespace: default
  name: cf-test-apitoken
spec:
  forProvider:
    name: "cf-test-apitoken"
    policy:
      - effect: allow
        permissionGroups:
          - "dafdsagrt42409uhfhjtnl44957"
        resources:
          "com.cloudflare.api.account.zone.${UUID IN HERE}": "*"

patches:
    - type: FromCompositeFieldPath
      fromFieldPath: spec.clusterName
      toFieldPath: spec.forProvider.tags
      transforms:
      - type: string
        string:
          type: Format
          fmt: '{"kubernetes.io/cluster/%s": "true"}'
      - type: convert
        convert:
          toType: object
          format: json

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with crossplane installed or the issue environment reproducible.
